_comment: MCP Server Configuration Template — Layer 4 (Client Engagement)
Configure this file during /client-onboard or manually.
Only include servers needed for this engagement.
- OAuth 2.0: For managed/remote MCP servers (Atlassian Cloud, GCP managed)
- API Token: For Atlassian Server/DC, personal access tokens
IMPORTANT: Never commit credentials to version control.
Use environment variables or Claude Code's secure credential storage.
Official Atlassian MCP server (remote, for Cloud instances).
Provides: Jira issue CRUD, Confluence page CRUD, search.
For Atlassian Server/DC, use the community server instead:
